PostToolUse.command: filepath=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path":\s*"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*"file_path":\s*"//;s/"$//'); case "$filepath" in */frontend/*) cd frontend && npx prettier --write "$filepath" 2>/dev/null;; */backend/*.py) cd backend && uv run ruff format "$filepath" 2>/dev/null && uv run ruff check --fix "$filepath" 2>/dev/null;; esac; exit 0

PreToolUse.command: echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q '"file_path".*\.env"' && echo 'BLOCKED: do not edit .env files — use .blueprint.env for templates' && exit 1; exit 0

echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE '(alembic\s+(upgrade|downgrade|stamp)|psql|pg_dump|pg_restore|dropdb|createdb|DROP\s|DELETE\s+FROM|TRUNCATE|ALTER\s+TABLE|INSERT\s+INTO|UPDATE\s+.*SET)' && echo 'BLOCKED: direct database operations are not allowed — only prod DB exists' && exit 1; exit 0
